overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban intersection beneath an elevated highway, then proceeding along a sidewalk guarded by Arasaka corporate security forces. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with industrial elements, steam vents, graffiti-covered walls, and a mix of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles.

events.description: crossing the street at the marked intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection toward the crosswalk beneath the elevated highway

entered.detail: multi-level concrete highway structure with red accents spanning overhead
large white and red electrical utility boxes with warning stripes
futuristic buildings with glass facades and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban intersection beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The camera moves through the crosswalk, passing large utility boxes on the right while futuristic commercial buildings rise in the background. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the crossing area.

events.description: moving from open intersection onto covered sidewalk next to industrial wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the industrial building with steam vents

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art with steam vents
black armored SUV with Arasaka corporate branding and red accent lighting
industrial piping running along the ceiling of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the open intersection, the scene moves onto a covered sidewalk alongside an industrial facility. The concrete wall features extensive graffiti and steam vents, while black Arasaka armored SUVs are parked along the curb. The environment shifts from exposed to sheltered under the building overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate security checkpoint with armed guards

events.description: slowing pace while approaching the Arasaka security detail
security guards gesture and monitor pedestrians passing by

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking past the line of Arasaka security guards standing at attention

notable_agents.action: security officer with red cybernetic visor and topknot hairstyle checking a device
Arasaka guard in black suit with red accents standing at attention near the SUV

entered.detail: line of corporate security personnel in black suits with red visors and cybernetic implants

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a corporate security checkpoint where Arasaka guards in black suits with red cybernetic visors stand in formation along the sidewalk. The guards monitor the area while the camera passes between the parked armored SUVs and the industrial wall. A prominent security officer with distinctive red glasses and a topknot hairstyle stands near the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk continuing past security zone

events.description: exiting the security checkpoint area and continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk away from the Arasaka security detail

segments.scene_description: Moving past the security checkpoint, the scene opens up along the continuing covered sidewalk. The Arasaka vehicles and guards fall behind as the camera proceeds toward more distant pedestrians and commercial buildings ahead. The industrial wall remains on the right while the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, exposed urban intersection into a sheltered corporate security corridor. It begins by gliding through a crosswalk beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, passing utility boxes and scattered pedestrians amidst towering commercial buildings. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from the open intersection to a covered sidewalk characterized by graffiti-covered industrial walls and hissing steam vents. The scene then tightens as it passes through a security checkpoint, moving between parked black Arasaka armored SUVs and a line of guards in black suits with red cybernetic visors. Finally, the camera proceeds past the security detail and the officer with the distinctive topknot, as the path opens up again toward distant pedestrians and the city's commercial skyline.
